overview: A professional business information website for Fresh Valley Produce, a vegetable wholesaler. Showcases the company profile, product catalog, services, and a contact form for B2B inquiries from retailers and restaurants.
features: Hero section with headline and call-to-action
Company profile with mission and key stats
Product catalog with 12+ vegetables and detail views
Fully responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Smooth-scroll navigation with mobile hamburger menu
Footer with company info and quick links
